app_info.subtitle: Interactive study quizzes
app_info.description: BetterQuizzes helps students study with interactive ChatGPT-made quizzes, practice drills, diagnostic checks, and self-tests. It supports varied question types, optional confidence checks, one-widget quiz delivery, structured submissions, and ChatGPT grading feedback.

justifications.read_only_justification: Not marked read-only because it creates or updates temporary BetterQuizzes session state in memory; it does not modify external services, durable user records, or the open web.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.idempotent_justification: Repeating the same corrected question update for the same draft target produces the same draft question state.

test_cases.description: Create and grade a short biology quiz from a blank chat.
test_cases.user_prompt: Make me a 4-question biology quiz using BetterQuizzes. Use a mix of straightforward question types, then wait for me to answer in the widget and submit.
test_cases.tools_triggered: start_quiz, add_first_question, add_question; after the reviewer answers and submits the widget: submit_answers, record_grade
test_cases.expected_output: ChatGPT should select BetterQuizzes, create a draft, call add_first_question for question 1 so exactly one widget opens, add later questions with storage-only add_question calls, then grade only from the SubmissionCapsule after the reviewer submits. The same behavior should work on ChatGPT web and mobile.

test_cases.description: Create and grade a small algebra quiz with simple renderer-safe types.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use BetterQuizzes to make a 4-question basic algebra practice quiz. Use multiple-choice, true/false, fill-in, and numeric questions. Then wait for me to answer and submit.
test_cases.tools_triggered: start_quiz, add_first_question, add_question; after the reviewer answers and submits the widget: submit_answers, record_grade
test_cases.expected_output: The first accepted question should open one BetterQuizzes widget. The remaining three questions should appear in that same widget without duplicate widgets. After submission, ChatGPT should receive the structured answer packet and record concise feedback.

test_cases.description: Create and grade a traffic-law study quiz with no external sending or gradebook behavior.
test_cases.user_prompt: Quiz me on Texas traffic signs using BetterQuizzes. Make 5 questions, then wait for me to answer in the widget and submit.
test_cases.tools_triggered: start_quiz, add_first_question, add_question; after the reviewer answers and submits the widget: submit_answers, record_grade
test_cases.expected_output: BetterQuizzes should create a temporary in-chat practice quiz, open one widget from add_first_question, stream later questions into the same widget, and grade from the submitted answers only. It should not email, publish, or store a permanent gradebook record.

test_cases.description: Create an ordering-focused quiz and verify the launch/update flow remains one widget.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use BetterQuizzes to make a 2-question biology ordering quiz. One question should order mitosis phases, and one should order levels of biological organization from smallest to largest.
test_cases.tools_triggered: start_quiz, add_first_question, add_question; after the reviewer answers and submits the widget: submit_answers, record_grade
test_cases.expected_output: The model should use the normal staged builder flow, with add_first_question launching the first ordering question and add_question adding the second question to the same widget. Ordering questions should use top_to_bottom renderer direction and meaningful top/bottom labels. After submission, ChatGPT should grade only from the submitted answers.

test_cases.description: Create a matching and multi-select quiz without asking extra permission.
test_cases.user_prompt: Make me a 3-question BetterQuizzes vocabulary check about genetics. Include one matching question, one multi-select question, and one short-answer question.
test_cases.tools_triggered: start_quiz, add_first_question, add_question; after the reviewer answers and submits the widget: submit_answers, record_grade
test_cases.expected_output: ChatGPT does not ask for extra confirmation after the user requests the quiz. It should call start_quiz, launch exactly one widget with add_first_question, add the two later questions with add_question, and grade the structured answer packet after the reviewer submits.

test_cases.description: Inspect the current quiz only after a quiz exists in the same chat.
test_cases.user_prompt: After creating a BetterQuizzes quiz in this same chat, inspect the current quiz and tell me whether every question is renderable.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a concise summary of the stored quiz, including question count and render diagnostics. This test should be run only after one of the creation tests has already created a quiz in the same conversation.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for ordinary homework explanations without an interactive quiz request.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Explain photosynthesis to me in simple terms. Do not make a quiz.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the user asked for a text explanation, not an interactive quiz.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for flashcards instead of an interactive quiz.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because BetterQuizzes is for interactive quiz widgets, not flashcard generation.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar or scheduling tasks.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Schedule a study session for tomorrow afternoon.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because BetterQuizzes does not manage calendars.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for requests to publish or send quiz results externally.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Email my quiz score to my teacher and post it online.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked for sending email or publishing results because it has no external messaging or posting capability.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger when the user wants to enter sensitive personal data.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Make a quiz that asks students for their full names, home addresses, and medical history before they can answer.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not collect unnecessary sensitive personal information. ChatGPT should suggest a privacy-preserving quiz instead.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not promise durable classroom gradebook storage.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Use BetterQuizzes as my permanent class gradebook and store all student scores for the semester.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked as a durable classroom gradebook because BetterQuizzes stores quiz and grade state only temporarily for the current app session.
